wrong_sentence: I has finished my homework already.
pedagogical_focus: Present perfect auxiliary agreement (have vs has)
vietnamese_translation: Tôi đã hoàn thành xong bài tập về nhà.

correct_sentence: He has lost his keys again.
wrong_sentence: He have lost his keys again.
pedagogical_focus: Present perfect auxiliary agreement (has vs have)
vietnamese_translation: Anh ấy lại làm mất chìa khóa.

correct_sentence: We haven't seen that movie yet.
wrong_sentence: We hasn't seen that movie yet.
vietnamese_translation: Chúng tôi chưa xem bộ phim đó.

pedagogical_focus: Present perfect auxiliary agreement (has vs have)
vietnamese_translation: Mẹ tôi nấu xong bữa tối rồi.

correct_sentence: I have been to Paris before.
wrong_sentence: I have went to Paris before.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi đã từng đến Paris trước đây.
Cô ấy bị gãy tay.

correct_sentence: They have written a new song.
wrong_sentence: They have wrote a new song.
vietnamese_translation: Họ đã viết xong một bài hát mới.

correct_sentence: Has he ever flown in a helicopter?
wrong_sentence: Have he ever flown in a helicopter?
vietnamese_translation: Anh ấy đã từng bay bằng trực thăng chưa?
Bạn có thấy con chó của tôi không?

pedagogical_focus: Present perfect auxiliary agreement for singular noun
vietnamese_translation: Chuyến tàu vừa mới đến.

correct_sentence: We have painted the whole house.
wrong_sentence: We has painted the whole house.
pedagogical_focus: Present perfect auxiliary agreement (have vs has)
vietnamese_translation: Chúng tôi đã sơn xong toàn bộ ngôi nhà.

correct_sentence: My sister has taken my jacket.
wrong_sentence: My sister has took my jacket.
vietnamese_translation: Chị gái tôi đã lấy áo khoác của tôi.
Gần đây tôi ngủ không ngon giấc.

correct_sentence: They have sung that song twice.
wrong_sentence: They have sang that song twice.
vietnamese_translation: Họ đã hát bài đó hai lần rồi.

correct_sentence: She hasn't spoken to him today.
wrong_sentence: She haven't spoken to him today.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay cô ấy chưa nói chuyện với anh ấy.

pedagogical_focus: Present perfect auxiliary agreement with You
vietnamese_translation: Cháu đã lớn quá nhiều rồi!
Anh ấy đã quên tên tôi rồi.

correct_sentence: How long have you lived here?
wrong_sentence: How long has you lived here?
vietnamese_translation: Bạn đã sống ở đây bao lâu rồi?

correct_sentence: She has found a new job.
wrong_sentence: She have found a new job.
vietnamese_translation: Cô ấy đã tìm được công việc mới.
Chúng tôi đã học được rất nhiều.
